title: DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES - 211info
text: DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES DOUGLAS COUNTY CANCER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides programs such as patient travel assistance, patient financial assistance, wigs, hats, bras, and breast prostheses. 2880 NW Stewart Parkway Suite 202 Roseburg, OR 97471 Eligibility: Individuals who have been diagnosed with cancer Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 440-9409 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-9409 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Incidental Medical Expense Assistance * Cancer Prosthetics/Orthotics/Seating * Cancer Underwear/Sleepwear * Cancer Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
